The woman, the PS5, and the sofa are all sharp.", "settings": "Smartphone Simulation, 24mm Lens, 1/100s, ISO 400 (Natural Window Light)" }, "color_grading": { "white_balance": "Neutral Daylight (Cozy/Warm)", "shadows": "Soft shadows on floor and sofa", "highlights": "Soft highlights on blonde hair and skin" } }, "final_prompt_string": "A candid raw mirror selfie photograph shot on Smartphone f/11. Deep depth of field, everything in focus. A curvy young woman (20-25) with light tan skin and long straight blonde hair standing sideways in a tall arched floor mirror. She is twisting her body to show her profile and making a playful kissy face. She wears a tight black sleeveless tank top and tight light pink booty shorts. She holds a black iPhone. Background is sharp and detailed: A modern living room with a grey sofa, a white media cabinet with a white PlayStation 5 console and black headphones, and a faux fireplace are clearly visible with no bokeh. Soft natural window lighting. Cozy influencer aesthetic.", "negative_prompt_string": "", "note_on_negative": "Flux ignores explicit negative prompts. #4 3D Render
video gameanimated/pixar
cinematic product poster of an XBOX controller, centered and fully visible, floating against a clean background inspired by the brand’s core color palette. The product must remain intact and uncut, but be conceptually split by design: • One half is photorealistic, showcasing accurate materials, textures, reflections, buttons, surfaces, and premium build quality • The other half transforms seamlessly into flat digital elements that represent the brand’s ecosystem — UI fragments, abstract tech shapes, interface cards, schematic overlays, soft holographic effects, or minimal glitch-style geometry Lighting: Cinematic, high-end studio lighting with controlled highlights and soft shadows, emphasizing form and depth. Typography: Bold double-exposure style text displaying the product or brand name, integrated cleanly into the composition. Official logo placed subtly and professionally in one corner. @sunkisshq @sunkissup

#6 Unique 🧚‍♀️
Create a 1/7 scale commercialized figure of Wonder Woman, in a realistic style. Place the figure on a computer desk, using a circular transparent acrylic base without any text. On the computer screen, display the ZBrush modeling process of the figure. Next to the computer screen, place a BANDAI-style toy packaging box printed with the original artwork.
#7 Unique 🧚‍♀️
A hyper-realistic, 8k, low-angle wide-shot captures a surreal scene at golden hour, with cinematic lighting emphasizing the warm, diffused glow of a sunset sky that transitions from a vibrant orange-pink at the horizon to a softer pastel hue overhead. The composition features a long, empty asphalt road with prominent, worn double yellow lines creating strong leading lines that recede into the distance, drawing the viewer's eye towards the subject. The main character, uploaded face as reference, is seated in mid-air upon a dense, dark grey, volumetric cloud, defying gravity directly above the road. They are wearing a yellow t-shirt with "Ai Trends" visible on the sleeve, heavily ripped blue jeans, and black high-top sneakers with white laces and a subtle red trim. Smaller, lighter white smoke or cloud puffs are scattered on the cracked asphalt road surface and near the character's feet, suggesting a magical trail or residue. The background features utility poles with wires, sparse desert-like trees, and distant streetlights, all bathed in the warm, soft light of the setting sun, creating a subtle bokeh effect in the far distance. The image boasts highly detailed textures on the road, clothing, and clouds, with soft shadows and a dreamlike, ethereal atmosphere.
#8 AI Influencer 💁‍♀️
collage
Create a full Instagram-style 3×3 grid feed composed of nine different portrait images, all featuring the person and the dog from the attached image. ensure that the middle photo is the same photo as the attached image, Ensure the person’s identity, facial structure, and style remain consistent across all nine posts. Each of the 9 images should present a unique concept, outfit, pose, and environment that fits a stylish, modern Instagram aesthetic. Include a mix of: – Lifestyle shots – Cinematic portraits – Fashion/streetwear scenes – Close-up beauty shots – Travel or outdoor vibes – Cozy indoor moments – Minimalist studio portraits Make every image hyperrealistic and shot as if with a professional camera: – Natural skin texture – Accurate lighting – Sharp details – Professional depth of field – High-quality color grading – Authentic expressions and posing Ensure all 9 images feel coherent as a feed: – Consistent character likeness – Similar visual tone and color palette – Aesthetic balance across the grid – Cinematic and modern photography style Final deliverable: a 3×3 Instagram grid layout of nine separate 3:4 ratio hyperrealistic portraits of the person from the attached photo.

a woman in a convenient store crying while getting a refill on her icee drink from a soda fountain, she looks into the camera and in an upset and crying tone she says "I've had a rough day. I just found out I was made with a prompt. I'm not real!" And she starts to cry
#10 Unique 🧚‍♀️
A woman standing still in a surreal desert landscape, surrounded by warm golden light. She wears an avant-garde, architectural outfit made of lightweight poplin and thin drill, designed for desert heat but with haute couture precision. The silhouette is sculptural and structured, with layered geometric panels and color-blocked patchwork — no ruffles, no soft flowing fabrics. The design combines functionality and extravagance through sharp lines and complex construction. She wears a large sculptural hood that stands on its own, inspired by accordion-like folds and futuristic shell forms. The hood is covered with red heart patterns — bold, graphic, and modern, symbolizing strength and vitality. These hearts are printed or appliqued across the folds, glowing against the bright lilac and yellow surfaces. The rest of the outfit features architectural patchwork in vivid yellow and lilac as dominant colors, with smaller accents of turquoise, coral, fuchsia, emerald, and soft metallic hues. Some fabric blocks are matte, others iridescent or semi-transparent, creating dynamic reflections under the desert sun. The overall atmosphere is maximalist yet refined — a blend of surreal desert poetry, pop-art emotion, and high-fashion craftsmanship. The woman appears serene, radiant, and powerful, as if her hood of hearts shields her from the sun and the world itself.

selfie
A raw, screen-captured livestream still of a 24-year-old female influencer sitting on her unmade bed at night, frozen mid-reaction as something shocking happens off-camera. Ring light slightly off-axis causing uneven facial falloff, skin texture intact with visible pores, faint under-eye creasing. Phone camera glare reflects in her pupils. Pixel noise crawling in the shadows. Looks accidentally captured, not posed.

Shot on Sony A7R IV, 35mm lens, f/2.8, raw uncompressed

a young 24 year old woman, blonde hair with blue eyes sitting on a chair facing away from the camera, watching multiple computer screens filled with YouTube trading videos, the YouTube logo glowing clearly on one of the screens, colorful thumbnails with titles like "Secret Strategy," "100% Win Rate," and "Trading Made Easy," dimly lit room with blue and red monitor light reflecting on his face, cluttered desk with notes and coffee cup, representing information overload and naive confidence, cinematic lighting, realistic photo style, shallow depth of field, 35mm lens,
#23 Unique 🧚‍♀️
An illusionary interior that looks like a living room, but the "air" acts like water. Air bubbles are trapped in zero gravity, rising slowly. A goldfish swims through the air past a floating lamp. Light refracts through the room as if underwater, creating dancing caustic patterns on the sofa and carpet. Lighting: Dappled sunlight filtering from above, aqua-tinted atmosphere. Tech: Arri Alexa Mini, anamorphic lens, cinematic color grading. Meta: Ethereal, dreamcore, volumetric fog, light rays, mesmerizing, detailed textures, 4k.

#27 professional photoshoot
A professional, high-resolution profile photo, maintaining the exact facial structure, identity, and key features of the person in the input image. The subject is framed from the chest up, with ample headroom. The person looks directly at the camera. They are styled for a professional photo studio shoot, wearing a premium smart casual blazer in a subtle charcoal gray. The background is a solid '#562226' neutral studio color. Shot from a high angle with bright and airy soft, diffused studio lighting, gently illuminating the face and creating a subtle catchlight in the eyes, conveying a sense of clarity. Captured on an 85mm f/1.8 lens with a shallow depth of field, exquisite focus on the eyes, and beautiful, soft bokeh. Observe crisp detail on the fabric texture of the blazer, individual strands of hair, and natural, realistic skin texture. The atmosphere exudes confidence, professionalism, and approachability. Clean and bright cinematic color grading with subtle warmth and balanced tones, ensuring a polished and contemporary feel.

#36 AI Influencer 💁‍♀️
streaming
A raw, screen-captured livestream still of a 24-year-old female influencer sitting on her unmade bed at night, frozen mid-reaction as something shocking happens off-camera. Her eyes are widened instinctively, mouth slightly open, expression unperformed. Heavy H.264 livestream compression, macro-blocking in shadow areas, banding in the dark walls. Ring light slightly off-axis causing uneven facial falloff, skin texture intact with visible pores, faint under-eye creasing. Phone camera glare reflects in her pupils. Pixel noise crawling in the shadows. Looks accidentally captured, not posed.

#55 Candid Paparazzi 📸
{ "meta_data": { "style": "Modern High-Res Paparazzi/Press Photography", "aspect_ratio": "3:2" }, "prompt_components": { "subject_analysis": "Candid capture of an A-list actress e.g. completely off-guard at 5 AM. She has messy, unkempt hair tied loosely, wearing oversized patterned pajama pants, a mismatched hoodie, and slide sandals. She is squinting intensely, flinching away from a sudden flash, holding a cardboard take-out coffee carrier in one hand and a bright blue tied-off plastic dog poop bag in the other. Her expression is one of annoyance and exhaustion.", "the_chaos_factor": "Pre-dawn darkness on a wet city sidewalk. A small, scruffy rescue dog on a taut leash pulls her forward. The frame edges show the lenses and arms of competing photographers shoving in. A large security guard's hand partially enters the frame, attempting to block the lens. Wet pavement reflects the harsh light.", "lighting_tech": "Harsh, direct on-camera strobe flash creating blinding white highlights on her skin and clothing, and hard, deep shadows immediately behind her. The background features mixed color temperatures from warm tungsten streetlights and neon bodega signs reacting to the cool flash.", "camera_gear": "Canon EOS R3 + RF 24-70mm f/2.8 L IS USM lens.", "image_quality_tech": "ISO 200, 8k resolution, ultra-detailed textures on fabric and hair, incredibly sharp focus on her squinting eyes, clean digital capture, zero noise, hyper-realistic.", "meta_tokens": "candid street style, modern press photo, exclusive editorial capture, raw moment, TMZ style, stolen shot, Associated Press wire." }, "full_prompt_string": "A harsh, direct flash paparazzi photograph capturing an A-list actress off-guard at 5 AM on a wet city sidewalk. She is squinting and flinching, wearing oversized pajama pants, a mismatched hoodie, and slides, with messy hair. She holds a coffee carrier and a blue poop bag, pulled by a scruffy dog on a leash. A security guard's hand tries to block the frame. The lighting is a blinding on-camera strobe mixed with warm background streetlights. Canon EOS R3 capture, RF 24-70mm f/2.8 L IS USM lens, ISO 200, 8k resolution, razor sharp focus, ultra-detailed textures, zero noise, highly realistic, candid street style, modern press photo, raw moment, exclusive capture.", "negative_prompt": "film grain, noise, pixelation, blurry, low quality, distortion, artifacts, high ISO, vintage grain, soft focus, studio lighting, softbox, beauty dish, posed, cinematic golden hour, glamour shot, perfectly styled hair, smiling at camera" }

#57 Ad/Product
Ad
"Act as an Art Director for an Urban Editorial Campaign. PHASE 1: THE PHOTOGRAPHY. - Perspective: Extreme low-angle (worm’s eye view). - Subject & Pose: A stylish 24 year old beautiful woman in oversized streetwear. One hand is reaching directly toward the lens (strong foreshortening), while the other holds a Bloom Energy Drink. - Setting: Outdoor shot against a clear blue sky with natural, high-contrast sunlight. PHASE 2: DYNAMIC TYPOGRAPHY & FX. - Typography: Massive, heavy Sans-Serif font spelling ""BLOOM"" acting as a graphic frame. - Distortion Logic ([DISTORTION]):  - ""Classic"": Clean, sharp, massive geometric letters.  - ""Glitch"": Sliced, shifted segments with digital noise and offset paths.  - ""Liquid"": Warped, melting, and fluid-like letterforms as if the ink is dripping.  - ""Warp"": Stretched and perspective-distorted letters following the camera's wide-angle curve. Color Execution: Apply gradient blue and purple exclusively to all typography and graphic borders. Contrast Rule: The subject and background MUST remain in their natural cinematic colors, while the text acts as a vibrant gradient purple synthetic overlay. Technique: Use high-contrast ink separation to ensure blue and purple gradient does not bleed into the photography. PHASE 3: PERIMETER & COMPOSITION. - Border Logic: Autonomously simulate the edge elements. Replace coordinates with dynamic metadata: use product serial numbers ""ITEM NO. 00-26"", copyright symbols, or repeating brand mottos. - Execution: Place these elements strictly at the top and bottom horizontal margins as a secondary layer. - Color: Force purple with 100% opacity to ensure visual separation from the background. TECH SPECS: 14mm wide-angle lens, f/8, vivid color profile, urban brutalist aesthetic."

candid paparazzi
A candid paparazzi beach shot of a beautiful 24 year old woman emphasizing real skin tone variation—tan lines visible at straps, subtle redness on shoulders, paler underarms. #59 Unique 🧚‍♀️
A transparent, clear-cased Game Boy Color held in a hand. Inside the clear plastic case, instead of circuit boards, there are living biological organs. A tiny beating heart powers the battery, veins replace the wires, and the screen displays a glowing biological pulse. The plastic is slightly fogged from the internal heat. Macro photography, clinical lighting.

#68 AI Influencer 💁‍♀️
3D
{   "prompt": "Create a hyper-realistic, cinematic Instagram post layout where the Instagram UI exists as a physical, tangible 3D object, photographed like a premium commercial product shot. The result should feel indistinguishable from a real studio photograph.\n\nInstagram Frame (UI Accuracy – Critical):\n- Authentic Instagram interface rendered as a solid white physical 3D card\n- Smooth matte plastic surface with subtle micro-texture\n- Slight thickness visible on edges, realistic bevels\n- Perfectly rounded corners (exact Instagram radius)\n- Soft studio reflections and realistic edge highlights\n\nTop Bar (Pixel-accurate UI):\n- Circular profile avatar on the left\n- Username text: \"Cherry\" in Instagram’s default bold UI font\n- Light blue FOLLOW button with correct proportions\n- Three-dot menu icon aligned to the far right\n- Exact spacing, typography, and icon sizing matching the real Instagram app\n- Aspect ratio 1:1, centered, balanced, premium composition\n\nMain Subject (Pose – Match Reference Image Exactly):\n- A photorealistic athletic woman partially emerging out of the Instagram frame into real 3D space\n- Seated pose:\n  - Both legs bent and angled to the side\n  - One knee slightly raised and closer to the chest\n  - Arms gently wrapped around the raised knee\n  - Hands relaxed, fingers naturally resting\n  - Torso leaning slightly back against the frame edge\n- Expression: calm, thoughtful, self-assured\n- Gaze: looking slightly to the side and upward, not engaging the camera\n- Natural body proportions, relaxed posture, editorial realism\n- No exaggerated curves, no artificial posing\n\nClothing (Nike Only – Realistic Fit):\n- Muted ivory/off-white Nike fitted short-sleeve blouse\n  - Visible white Nike swoosh\n  - Natural fabric stretch and tension\n- Deep blue Nike athletic pants, length up to the knee\n  - Tailored performance-fit silhouette\n  - Realistic fabric weight with subtle folds at the knee bend\n  - Clean stitching and breathable sports material\n- Clean white Nike sneakers\n  - Slight wear realism\n  - Correct sole texture and stitching\n- Premium sportswear look, real commercial styling\n- No distortion, no fantasy fashion\n\nBackground (Inside the Instagram Post Only):\n- Dark indoor gym or studio environment\n- Cool blue and muted purple cinematic lighting\n- Soft haze in the background\n- Subtle volumetric light beams barely visible\n- Shallow depth of field, background softly blurred\n- Subject and Instagram frame remain sharp and dominant\n\nLighting & Photorealism:\n- Studio-grade cinematic lighting\n- Soft key light illuminating the subject naturally\n- Gentle rim light outlining the body and Instagram frame\n- Realistic skin texture with visible pores and natural highlights\n- Accurate contact shadows where the subject touches the frame\n- Physically correct light falloff and reflections\n\nFooter UI (Engagement Section):\n- Instagram action icons: like, comment, share, save (accurate icons)\n- Text visible: \"785 likes\"\n- Caption begins with \"Cherry\"\n- Caption text:\n  \"Freedom isn’t found in comfort. It’s built in the quiet moments where discipline meets belief.\"\n- Hashtags partially visible and naturally cropped\n\nOverall Style & Quality:\n- Ultra-high resolution\n- Advertising-grade realism\n- Clean, modern, editorial Instagram aesthetic\n- Hyper-realistic blend of 3D object + real photography\n- No extra elements\n- No text errors\n- No distortion\n- Looks like a real product photoshoot, not AI art" }

selfie

#70 Unique 🧚‍♀️
A hyper-realistic wide shot of a modern Scandinavian kitchen where gravity has momentarily failed. Spheres of hot black coffee and swirling cream are suspended in mid-air, colliding to create marbleized liquid planets. A slice of toast crumbles, with individual crumbs floating near the lens. Lighting: Bathed in intense, volumetric morning sunlight streaming through floor-to-ceiling windows, creating caustics on the wooden floor. Tech: Shot on Hasselblad H6D-100c, 80mm lens, f/2.8, 1/8000s shutter speed to freeze motion. Meta: 8k resolution, fluid simulation, subsurface scattering, photorealism, tyndall effect, sharp focus, cinematic lighting.

#81 Candid Paparazzi 📸
{   "meta_data": {     "style": "Raw Paparazzi/Press Photography",     "aspect_ratio": "3:2"   },   "prompt_components": {     "subject_analysis": "A woman in her late 20s exiting the back seat of a black Cadillac Escalade, caught mid-movement as she steps out, one hand shielding her face from the barrage of flashes, the other gripping the door for balance. Her expression is tense and reactive, eyes half-squinted from sudden strobe bursts. Clothing includes a reflective satin dress that harshly blows out under flash, with sharp specular highlights and wrinkling fabric textures emphasized by the lighting.",     "the_chaos_factor": "A dense press scrum surrounds the vehicle, shouting photographers pushing in from all angles, security guards extending arms to hold them back. Red carpet barricades, flickering premiere signage, screaming fans waving posters, police lights strobing in the distance. Traffic headlights smear in the background. Elbows, cameras, and phones intrude into frame, creating visual clutter and pressure.",     "lighting_tech": "Direct on-camera flash blasting the subject at close proximity, generating flat, unforgiving illumination with hard edge shadows falling directly behind her. Overexposed hotspots on skin and satin dress. Mixed Kelvin scene: cool, bluish flash dominating foreground while warm tungsten, neon reds from premiere signage, and ambient sodium vapor lights contaminate the background. Reflective car paint kicking specular flares into the lens.",     "camera_gear": "Canon 1D X Mark III with a 24-70mm f/2.8L lens at ~35mm, on-camera Speedlite 600EX-RT firing full power in burst mode.",     "imperfections_and_artifacts": "High ISO grain (ISO 6400+), slight motion blur from her stepping out and photographers bumping the shooter, marginal back-focus due to chaotic conditions, lens flare ghosts from headlights, chromatic aberration around high-contrast edges, rolling shutter skew from quick repositioning, clipped highlights from flash burn.",     "meta_tokens": "candid street style, invasive paparazzi energy, gettyimages archive aesthetic, raw dng realism, unpolished press capture, chaotic red carpet arrival, tabloid intensity"   },   "full_prompt_string": "a woman in her late 20s exiting a black Cadillac Escalade at a movie premiere, caught mid-movement shielding her face from aggressive press flashes, tense expression, reflective satin dress blowing out under direct on-camera flash, chaotic press scrum with photographers, yelling fans, security pushing back, red carpet barricades and neon premiere signage, mixed lighting with harsh bluish flash plus warm tungsten and red neon spill, specular reflections bouncing off Escalade paint, Canon 1D X Mark III + 24-70mm f/2.8L, Speedlite 600EX-RT full power, high ISO grain, slight motion blur, back-focus imperfection, lens flare ghosts, chromatic aberration, rolling shutter skew, clipped highlights, candid street style, press photo realism, gettyimages archive aesthetic, raw dng",   "negative_prompt": "studio lighting, softbox, beauty dish, perfect glamour shot, posed, smiling at camera, smooth skin, low noise, clean composition, cinematic golden hour, shallow depth of field bokeh rendering" }
#82 Upscale
reference image
Cinematic Frame 8K Upscale Prompt: Use the original image as a strict reference and preserve the original composition, subject identity, camera angle and scene structure. Perform ultra-high-resolution 8K upscaling with maximum detail enhancement. Enhance natural textures across the frame including skin, fabrics, surfaces, hair and environmental details while preserving natural imperfections. Improve clarity and micro-detail while maintaining a natural look. Balance highlights and shadows with realistic dynamic range and reduce noise or compression artifacts without losing texture. Apply cinematic color grading with true-to-life tones, cinematic lighting, natural depth of field and a professional cinema camera look. Ultra-photorealistic result, film still quality, high-end cinema production detail

#87 Greenscreen
A full-screen streaming overlay that frames the broadcast within a high-end gaming room setup, The background is a dark wall with a textured geometric pattern, illuminated by customizable neon light strips (currently blue and magenta) that form abstract shapes or generic text like 'Let's AI''. In the center, a large, sleek monitor frame holds the green screen area, resting on a dark wooden desk. To the left, a professional broadcast microphone with a glowing grille is visible, and to the right, generic glowing gaming peripherals. A keyboard and mouse are on the desk surface within the frame.
#88 Ad/Product
A hyper-realistic 8k studio portrait, captured with a 50mm lens at eye-level, featuring a person with uploaded face as reference. The subject is seated centrally in a sleek, modern red swivel chair with a chrome base, legs casually crossed at the ankles, hands clasped in their lap. They wear a vibrant red bomber jacket with a subtle geometric line pattern, a crisp white crew-neck t-shirt, matching red slim-fit trousers, and clean white sneakers. Dark, rectangular sunglasses obscure their eyes. The background is a seamless, vibrant red, illuminated with soft, even studio lighting from the front, creating subtle shadows and a clean, high-key aesthetic. Dominating the upper background is a large, glossy, transparent acrylic letter 'M', positioned directly behind the subject, appearing to float against the red wall, catching and reflecting light, creating a subtle ethereal glow. The image features highly detailed textures and cinematic lighting.
#89 Isometric
Create a clear, 45° top-down isometric miniature 3D educational diorama explaining the process of building a Boeing 747 airplane. Use soft refined textures, realistic PBR materials, and gentle lifelike lighting. Build a stepped or layered diorama base showing each stage of the process with subtle arrows or paths. Include tiny stylized figures interacting with each stage (no facial details). Use a clean solid purple/blue background. At the top-center, display [747 AIRPLANE] in large bold text, directly beneath it show a short explanation subtitle, and place a minimal symbolic icon below. All text must automatically match the background contrast (white or black).
#90 Cinematic
Create a dynamic, 45° bottom-up, wide-angle cinematic scene depicting the deconstruction and recycling of a vintage steam locomotive in a chaotic scrapyard at night. Use harsh, gritty, weathered textures, hyper-detailed rust, and dramatic, high-contrast volumetric lighting with neon reflections. Design a fragmented, sunken terrain base with jagged, uneven layers, each representing a different phase of dismantling, with bold, glowing red arrows and erratic, broken paths. Feature expressive, oversized, shadowy figures in exaggerated poses, faces obscured by welding masks or shadows, actively tearing apart machinery with sparks and debris flying. Set against a complex, textured, dark orange/amber gradient background with industrial smoke and faint city lights. At the bottom-center, display [STEAM LOCOMOTIVE SCRAP] in distressed, metallic, ultra-bold text; directly above, add a gritty, urgent warning subtitle, and place a detailed, grunge-style hazard icon above. All text must automatically invert to maximize contrast with the background (black or white).

Generate this exact coordinate: 35.6586° N, 139.7454° E, as it appeared in: - 1600 (Edo period) - 1958 (year Tokyo Tower was completed) - 2025 - 2150 (plausible future) Maintain accurate terrain and geographic features. Show realistic architectural and urban progression across each era. Use the same camera angle, perspective, and framing across all time periods. #108 professional photoshoot
A hyper-realistic, ultra-high-resolution professional profile portrait, preserving the exact facial structure, identity, proportions, and micro-expressive nuances of the person in the input image. Chest-up composition, centered with natural posture and direct eye contact. Styled for a premium photo studio session, wearing a tailored smart-casual charcoal gray blazer with refined fabric grain and structured shape. Set against a clean, seamless studio backdrop, solid neutral #562226 tone, gently feathered for depth without gradients. Shot at a slightly high angle, flattering head shape and jawline. Soft, bright, airy diffused key light, large source, 45-degree offset, producing a clean catchlight and smooth dimensional facial modeling; subtle fill for zero harsh shadows. Captured on an 85mm f/1.8 portrait lens, shallow depth of field, pin-sharp eyes, smooth optical fall-off, and elegant creamy bokeh separation. Extreme micro-detail accuracy: natural skin texture (no airbrush), pores, flyaway hair strands, crisp blazer weave, realistic tonal transitions. Cinematic commercial color science: clean brightness, subtle warm tone balance, calibrated contrast, and professional finishing. Mood conveys confidence, intelligence, professionalism, and approachability. No distortions, no stylization, no artifacts, no AI plastic skin.

dyed pastel rose pink, dark roots showing.",    "texture": "Individual flyaways caught in the breeze, slightly stringy from humidity and stress."   },   "body": {    "skin": "High-resolution texture: visible pores on nose, hectic flush on cheeks visible through expensive foundation, slight sheen of sweat on forehead.",    "pose": "One hand pulling at her hair, the other holding an iPhone 15 Pro anxiously, hip cocked against the car barrier."   },   "clothing": {    "item_name": {     "type": "Archives Alexander McQueen metallic silver asymmetric dress.",     "fit": "Clinging awkwardly due to posture, fabric bunching at the waist.",     "material": "Highly reflective, structured chainmail fabric catching the flat daylight.",     "imperfection": "Road dust settling on the hem, a snag near hazard flashers reflecting off the wet asphalt.",   "optical_characteristics": "Razor sharp focus on the foreground subject and car, shallow depth of field rendered with creamy bokeh in the distant city traffic.",   "angle": "Eye-level street photography perspective."  },  "background": {   "setting": "Shoulder of the West Side Highway, NYC. Gritty concrete, metal guardrails.",   "elements": [    "Rosso Corsa Ferrari Portofino with the hood popped open, wisps of white steam escaping.",    "Detailed asphalt texture, gravel, oil stains, and discarded litter.",    "Dense, out-of-focus Manhattan skyline and heavy traffic flow in the mid-ground."   ],   "atmosphere": "Humid, heavy urban air thickened with exhaust fumes and steam.",   "vibe": {    "energy": "High-tension glamour meets gritty urban reality.",    "caption_energy": "The moment the photoshoot turned into a rescue mission."   }  } }
#111 Candid Paparazzi 📸
{   "meta_data": {     "style": "Raw Paparazzi/Press Photography - Telephoto Compression",     "aspect_ratio": "3:2 (standard full frame)"   },   "prompt_components": {     "subject_analysis": "A famous luxury fashion heiress mid-meltdown. She is red-faced, mouth open screaming, tears streaming down cheeks smudging mascara. She wears an expensive, rumpled designer cashmere tracksuit and has oversized sunglasses pushed atop messy blonde hair. One hand aggressively thrusts a passport into the air towards an unimpressed gate agent. A pile of logo-heavy Louis Vuitton luggage is next to her legs.",     "the_chaos_factor": "A deserted airport terminal gate late at night. Behind her, massive LED departure screens are aggressively glitching with corrupted text, static, and flashing colors. A stony-faced airline employee stands behind a podium saying 'CLOSED'. A few curious travelers watch from a distance.",     "lighting_tech": "Harsh direct on-camera strobe firing. The flash creates hot spots on her sweaty forehead and the plastic passport page, mixing uglily with the cold blue/green ambient terminal fluorescents and the flickering light from the glitching screens.",     "camera_gear": "Canon 1D X Mark III paired with a 70-200mm f/2.8L lens, zoomed to approx 135mm for compression from behind the barrier rope.",     "imperfections_and_artifacts": "High ISO color noise (ISO 12800). Motion blur on the gesturing hand holding the passport. Color banding and scan lines visible on the glitching background screens due to shutter speed sync issues. Gritty, unretouched aesthetic.",     "meta_tokens": "Candid street style, press photo realism, tabloid aesthetic, airport meltdown, viral moment, raw dng, grainy, unretouched, flash photography, public freakout."   },   "full_prompt_string": "Raw paparazzi photograph, telephoto lens compression, Canon 1D X Mark III, 70-200mm f/2.8. A luxury fashion heiress is screaming, tears welling, arguing with airport staff at a closed gate late at night. Passport raised aggressively mid-gesture. Rumpled designer tracksuit, messy hair, smudged mascara. Harsh direct on-camera flash mixed with ambient terminal light. Behind her, massive departure screens are glitching with corrupted static and text. High ISO grain, motion blur on hand, color banding from screens, gritty tabloid aesthetic, unretouched." }

{   "meta_data": {     "style": "Raw Paparazzi/Press Photography",     "aspect_ratio": "3:2 (standard full frame)"   },   "prompt_components": {     "subject_analysis": "Dishevelled pop star, recognizable but messy, tangled bleached hair, streaked mascara running down cheeks. Wearing a ripped silk party dress, clutching a grimy metal railing. One bare, dirty foot on wet asphalt, the other in a broken heel. A hand with chipped nail polish thrust directly toward the camera lens to shield face from intense light.",     "the_chaos_factor": "Grimy back alley behind a dive bar at 3:00 AM. Wet pavement reflecting sickly neon beer signs and red taillights. Overflowing dumpsters, graffiti-covered brick walls. A dense scrum of other photographers' arms, lenses, and flash units pushing into the frame, jostling the subject. A burly security guard's arm trying to push the camera back.",     "lighting_tech": "Brutal, direct on-camera strobe firing at full power. Flash burn on the subject's blocking hand and forehead. Mixed color temperatures: cool white flash clashes with warm, sickly tungsten streetlights and neon background signage.",     "camera_gear": "Nikon D6 DSLR coupled with a Nikkor 24-70mm f/2.8 lens, shot wide at 24mm.",     "imperfections_and_artifacts": "Extreme high ISO color noise (ISO 51200), significant motion blur from stumbling and camera shake. Focus is slightly missed on the blocking hand. Red-eye effect visible. Lens flare ghosts from direct flash hits on nearby surfaces.",     "meta_tokens": "Candid street style, press photo realism, raw extraction, tabloid aesthetic, tmz style, gettyimages archive aesthetic, grainy, unretouched."   },   "full_prompt_string": "Raw paparazzi photograph, Nikon D6 with 24-70mm f/2.8 lens at 24mm, brutal direct on-camera flash. A dishevelled pop star stumbles out of a grimey dive bar back door at 3:00 AM, hand thrust up blocking the blinding strobe light. Mascara running down face, tangled hair, torn silk dress. One bare dirty foot on wet asphalt, missing shoe. Flash burn highlights on skin. Chaotic alleyway environment, wet pavement reflecting neon, dumpsters, scrum of other photographers pushing in, security guard arms. Extreme high ISO grain, motion blur, missed focus, mixed lighting temperatures, tabloid aesthetic, press photo realism, unretouched raw extraction." }

A pop of direct, on-camera flash adds harsh specular highlights to the grease and gold.", "optical_characteristics": "Razor sharp focus on the bite point, deep depth of field showing the car interior details, zero distortion.", "angle": "Eye-level from the passenger seat, capturing the cramped intensity." }, "background": { "setting": "Driver's seat of a Bentley Continental GT at night.", "elements": [ "Sharply defined leather grain on the steering wheel", "Out-of-focus drive-thru menu board showing burger prices", "Reflective piano black dashboard surfaces showing smears" ], "atmosphere": "Stuffy car interior, scent of fried food, tense air.", "vibe": { "energy": "Manic, high-contrast desperation.", "contrast": "The priceless antique crown versus a $5 fast food burger.", "caption_energy": "Heavy lies the crown, hungry lies the stomach." } } }, "variation_b_twist": { "subject": { "description": "A cinematic, composed portrait of a woman in ornate queen regalia, staring deadpan ahead while mechanically eating a burger in a luxury SUV.", "mirror_rules": "Medium format portrait, subject's eyeline is straight ahead through the windshield, ignoring the camera.", "age": "30s", "expression": { "eyes": "Glassy, thousand-yard stare, unwavering, reflecting the neon signs outside.", "mouth": "Mechanically chewing, devoid of emotion or enjoyment.", "overall": "Existential dread, stoic absurdity." }, "hair": { "style": "Elaborate braided updo supporting a massive diamond and sapphire crown.", "texture": "Every strand perfectly placed but showing tension from the weight of the crown." }, "body": { "skin": "Flawless, high-resolution foundation texture showing individual pores. Slight indentation mark on the forehead from the crown's weight.", "pose": "Perfectly upright posture in the driver's seat, one hand holding the burger to mouth with regal poise, the other on the steering wheel." }, "clothing": { "regalia": { "type": "Deep sapphire blue silk velvet gown with elaborate silver and pearl beadwork.", "fit": "Tailored, structured bodice.", "material": "Silk velvet catching the light with a rich sheen. Individual pearls and silver wire visible in macro detail.", "imperfection": "None visible on the clothes; the imperfection is the burger wrapper in her pristine hand." } } }, "accessories": { "device": { "type": "Phase One IQ4", "details": "150MP Digital Back, Schneider Kreuznach lens, tripod mounted." } }, "photography": { "camera_style": "Medium Format Digital Cinematic Portrait", "quality": "8k resolution, ISO 100 (Zero Noise), massive dynamic range preserving details in deep velvet shadows and bright neon highlights.", "lighting": "Cinematic mixed lighting. Primary light is the drive-thru menu board (green/yellow cast) reflecting off her face and crown jewels. Interior car ambient light (soft purple LED) fills shadows.", "optical_characteristics": "Extremely shallow depth of field (creamy bokeh), focus razor sharp on her eyes and the crown jewels. The background is a beautiful wash of colored light.", "angle": "Slightly low angle from outside the car window, looking in." }, "background": { "setting": "Driver's seat of a Mercedes-Maybach GLS at a drive-thru window.", "elements": [ "The reflection of the crown superimposed over the drive-thru menu board in the window glass", "Pristine beige leather interior", "Rain streaks on the window glass exterior" ], "atmosphere": "Quiet, hermetically sealed luxury, melancholic.", "vibe": { "energy": "Absurdist, melancholic composure.", "contrast": "The stoic royal poise versus the mundane act of fast food consumption.", "caption_energy": "The realm is starving." } } } @cherryglow

#119 Image Grid
AI Influencer
Create a full Instagram-style 3×3 grid feed composed of nine different portrait images, all featuring the person from the attached image. ensure that the middle photo is the same photo as the attached image, Ensure the person’s identity, facial structure, and style remain consistent across all nine posts. Each of the 9 images should present a unique concept, outfit, pose, and environment that fits a stylish, modern Instagram aesthetic. Include a mix of: – Lifestyle shots – Cinematic portraits – Fashion/streetwear scenes – Close-up beauty shots – Travel or outdoor vibes – Cozy indoor moments – Minimalist studio portraits Make every image hyperrealistic and shot as if with a professional camera: – Natural skin texture – Accurate lighting – Sharp details – Professional depth of field – High-quality color grading – Authentic expressions and posing Ensure all 9 images feel coherent as a feed: – Consistent character likeness – Similar visual tone and color palette – Aesthetic balance across the grid – Cinematic and modern photography style Final deliverable: a 3×3 Instagram grid layout of nine separate 3:4 ratio hyperrealistic portraits of the person from the attached photo.

collage

Panel 1: A candid close-up of her adjusting an earpiece backstage, illuminated by harsh white vanity lights. Panel 2: A medium-wide shot of her walking down a moody, rain-slicked alleyway, illuminated by red neon. Panel 3: A low-angle hero shot on a massive stage surrounded by pyrotechnics. #123 Unique 🧚‍♀️
An ultra-macro shot of a futuristic metropolis built entirely inside the grooves of a spinning black vinyl record, illuminated by the needle's tracking light.
#124 Unique 🧚‍♀️
A close-up, macro photograph of an iPhone screen, but the entire user interface is hand-stitched embroidery on denim fabric. The app icons are raised, satin-stitched thread. The text is carefully embroidered in white thread. The background is indigo denim. Loose threads and fabric texture are visible. The 'battery' icon is a gold thread patch. Soft, side lighting to show the texture of the thread.
#125 Editorial
AI Influencer
Use the person in the input image @luna-new as the ONLY subject. Preserve their identity and facial features clearly. Create a hyper-realistic high-fashion editorial photo inside a surreal 3D geometric “color box” room (a hollow cube / tilted cube set). Each render MUST randomly choose: 1) a bold single-color box vivid and saturated, 2) a dynamic “cool” fashion pose (gravity-defying or extreme stretch / leap / sideways bracing against the walls), 3) a dramatic camera angle tilted horizon. The subject appears full-body and sharp, wearing an avant-garde fashion styling that feels modern and editorial premium fabric texture. Keep clothing tasteful and fashion-forward. The subject’s pose should feel athletic, stylish, and unusual—like a magazine campaign shot. Lighting: studio quality, crisp and cinematic; strong key light with controlled soft shadows, subtle rim light; realistic reflections and bounce light from the colored walls. Ultra-detailed skin texture, natural pores, realistic fabric weave, clean edges, high dynamic range.  Composition: subject centered with plenty of negative space and strong geometric lines; the box perspective frames the subject.  Color: the box color is a SINGLE bold color and MUST be different each run (random vivid hue). The subject’s outfit contrasts well with the box color. Output: hyper-real, photorealistic, 8k detail, editorial campaign quality, sharp focus on subject, no motion blur, no distortion of face, natural proportions. -new
#126 Editorial
food
Michelin-star culinary photography, close-up. A chef's hands, using precision tweezers, place a micro-herb on a seared Wagyu steak. Wisps of hot steam curl upwards, catching warm side-lighting. The glistening texture of a bordelaise reduction sauce, the charred crust of the meat, and the delicate structure of the garnish are in razor-sharp focus. Shallow depth of field, warm tones, incredibly mouth-watering detail, 85mm lens.

#144 Candid Paparazzi 📸
A raw, candid "paparazzi style" photograph taken outside during NYC Fashion Week. The model is walking quickly through a crowd, wearing oversized Balenciaga streetwear and sunglasses. The image is lit by a direct, harsh on-camera flash, causing shadows behind her and highlighting the texture of her clothing. There is slight motion blur in the background crowd. Lighting: Direct, hard flash photography. Tech: 35mm point-and-shoot film aesthetic, high contrast. Meta: Unpolished realism, street style, flash photography aesthetic, chaotic energy, high detail.

Behind her, massive LED departure screens are aggressively glitching with corrupted text, static, and flashing colors. A stony-faced airline employee stands behind a podium saying 'CLOSED'. A few curious travelers watch from a distance.",     "lighting_tech": "Harsh direct on-camera strobe firing. The flash creates hot spots on her sweaty forehead and the plastic passport page, mixing uglily with the cold blue/green ambient terminal fluorescents and the flickering light from the glitching screens.",     "camera_gear": "Canon 1D X Mark III paired with a 70-200mm f/2.8L lens, zoomed to approx 135mm for compression from behind the barrier rope.",     "imperfections_and_artifacts": "High ISO color noise (ISO 12800). Motion blur on the gesturing hand holding the passport. Color banding and scan lines visible on the glitching background screens due to shutter speed sync issues. Gritty, unretouched aesthetic.",     "meta_tokens": "Candid street style, press photo realism, tabloid aesthetic, airport meltdown, viral moment, raw dng, grainy, unretouched, flash photography, public freakout."   },   "full_prompt_string": "Raw paparazzi photograph, telephoto lens compression, Canon 1D X Mark III, 70-200mm f/2.8. A luxury fashion heiress is screaming, tears welling, arguing with airport staff at a closed gate late at night. Passport raised aggressively mid-gesture. Rumpled designer tracksuit, messy hair, smudged mascara. Harsh direct on-camera flash mixed with ambient terminal light. Behind her, massive departure screens are glitching with corrupted static and text. High ISO grain, motion blur on hand, color banding from screens, gritty tabloid aesthetic, unretouched." }
#166 Unique 🧚‍♀️
A high-performance sports car made entirely of ramen noodles. The tires are made of tightly rolled dark nori sheets, the windshield is a translucent slice of a boiled egg, and the exhaust pipes are fresh green onions. The car is drifting on a wooden table. Macro photography, high fidelity, steam rising from the engine.

#173 AI Influencer 💁‍♀️
streaming
A raw, screen-captured livestream still of a 24-year-old female influencer sitting on her unmade bed at night, frozen mid-reaction as something shocking happens off-camera. Her eyes are widened instinctively, mouth slightly open, expression unperformed. Heavy H.264 livestream compression, macro-blocking in shadow areas, banding in the dark walls. Ring light slightly off-axis causing uneven facial falloff, skin texture intact with visible pores, faint under-eye creasing. Phone camera glare reflects in her pupils. Pixel noise crawling in the shadows. Looks accidentally captured, not posed.

Wearing a ripped silk party dress, clutching a grimy metal railing. One bare, dirty foot on wet asphalt, the other in a broken heel. A hand with chipped nail polish thrust directly toward the camera lens to shield face from intense light.",     "the_chaos_factor": "Grimy back alley behind a dive bar at 3:00 AM. Wet pavement reflecting sickly neon beer signs and red taillights. Overflowing dumpsters, graffiti-covered brick walls. A dense scrum of other photographers' arms, lenses, and flash units pushing into the frame, jostling the subject. A burly security guard's arm trying to push the camera back.",     "lighting_tech": "Brutal, direct on-camera strobe firing at full power. Flash burn on the subject's blocking hand and forehead. Mixed color temperatures: cool white flash clashes with warm, sickly tungsten streetlights and neon background signage.",     "camera_gear": "Nikon D6 DSLR coupled with a Nikkor 24-70mm f/2.8 lens, shot wide at 24mm.",     "imperfections_and_artifacts": "Extreme high ISO color noise (ISO 51200), significant motion blur from stumbling and camera shake. Focus is slightly missed on the blocking hand. Red-eye effect visible. Lens flare ghosts from direct flash hits on nearby surfaces.",     "meta_tokens": "Candid street style, press photo realism, raw extraction, tabloid aesthetic, tmz style, gettyimages archive aesthetic, grainy, unretouched."   },   "full_prompt_string": "Raw paparazzi photograph, Nikon D6 with 24-70mm f/2.8 lens at 24mm, brutal direct on-camera flash. A dishevelled pop star stumbles out of a grimey dive bar back door at 3:00 AM, hand thrust up blocking the blinding strobe light. Mascara running down face, tangled hair, torn silk dress. One bare dirty foot on wet asphalt, missing shoe. Flash burn highlights on skin. Chaotic alleyway environment, wet pavement reflecting neon, dumpsters, scrum of other photographers pushing in, security guard arms. Extreme high ISO grain, motion blur, missed focus, mixed lighting temperatures, tabloid aesthetic, press photo realism, unretouched raw extraction." }

Pores visible on nose. Sauce smudged into a heavy beard.", "pose": "Hunched over the center console, elbows tucked, holding the burger with both hands like a prize." }, "clothing": { "regalia": { "type": "Heavy crimson velvet robe with gold bullion embroidery and ermine fur trim.", "fit": "Heavy and bulky, bunching up against the car seat.", "material": "Deep velvet nap visible, reflecting light differently where crushed. Grease stains on white fur cuffs." } } }, "accessories": { "device": { "type": "Sony A9 III", "details": "35mm f/1.4 GM lens, high-speed shutter, professional low-light capture." } }, "photography": { "camera_style": "Sony GM Master Lens Candid Street", "quality": "8k resolution, ISO 3200 fine, hyper-sharp on the burger and face, photonic engine clarity emphasizing texture.", "lighting": "Mixed physics: Harsh, cool fluorescent light from the drive-thru window hitting the side face, mixed with the warm glow of the car's dashboard screens. A pop of direct, on-camera flash adds harsh specular highlights to the grease and gold.", "optical_characteristics": "Razor sharp focus on the bite point, deep depth of field showing the car interior details, zero distortion.", "angle": "Eye-level from the passenger seat, capturing the cramped intensity." }, "background": { "setting": "Driver's seat of a Bentley Continental GT at night.", "elements": [ "Sharply defined leather grain on the steering wheel", "Out-of-focus drive-thru menu board showing burger prices", "Reflective piano black dashboard surfaces showing smears" ], "atmosphere": "Stuffy car interior, scent of fried food, tense air.", "vibe": { "energy": "Manic, high-contrast desperation.", "contrast": "The priceless antique crown versus a $5 fast food burger.", "caption_energy": "Heavy lies the crown, hungry lies the stomach." } } }, "variation_b_twist": { "subject": { "description": "A cinematic, composed portrait of a woman in ornate queen regalia, staring deadpan ahead while mechanically eating a burger in a luxury SUV.", "mirror_rules": "Medium format portrait, subject's eyeline is straight ahead through the windshield, ignoring the camera.", "age": "30s", "expression": { "eyes": "Glassy, thousand-yard stare, unwavering, reflecting the neon signs outside.", "mouth": "Mechanically chewing, devoid of emotion or enjoyment.", "overall": "Existential dread, stoic absurdity." }, "hair": { "style": "Elaborate braided updo supporting a massive diamond and sapphire crown.", "texture": "Every strand perfectly placed but showing tension from the weight of the crown." }, "body": { "skin": "Flawless, high-resolution foundation texture showing individual pores. Slight indentation mark on the forehead from the crown's weight.", "pose": "Perfectly upright posture in the driver's seat, one hand holding the burger to mouth with regal poise, the other on the steering wheel." }, "clothing": { "regalia": { "type": "Deep sapphire blue silk velvet gown with elaborate silver and pearl beadwork.", "fit": "Tailored, structured bodice.", "material": "Silk velvet catching the light with a rich sheen. Individual pearls and silver wire visible in macro detail.", "imperfection": "None visible on the clothes; the imperfection is the burger wrapper in her pristine hand." } } }, "accessories": { "device": { "type": "Phase One IQ4", "details": "150MP Digital Back, Schneider Kreuznach lens, tripod mounted." } }, "photography": { "camera_style": "Medium Format Digital Cinematic Portrait", "quality": "8k resolution, ISO 100 (Zero Noise), massive dynamic range preserving details in deep velvet shadows and bright neon highlights.", "lighting": "Cinematic mixed lighting. Primary light is the drive-thru menu board (green/yellow cast) reflecting off her face and crown jewels. Interior car ambient light (soft purple LED) fills shadows.", "optical_characteristics": "Extremely shallow depth of field (creamy bokeh), focus razor sharp on her eyes and the crown jewels. The background is a beautiful wash of colored light.", "angle": "Slightly low angle from outside the car window, looking in." }, "background": { "setting": "Driver's seat of a Mercedes-Maybach GLS at a drive-thru window.", "elements": [ "The reflection of the crown superimposed over the drive-thru menu board in the window glass", "Pristine beige leather interior", "Rain streaks on the window glass exterior" ], "atmosphere": "Quiet, hermetically sealed luxury, melancholic.", "vibe": { "energy": "Absurdist, melancholic composure.", "contrast": "The stoic royal poise versus the mundane act of fast food consumption.", "caption_energy": "The realm is starving." } } } @cherryglow

#183 Image Grid
AI Influencer
Create a full Instagram-style 3×3 grid feed composed of nine different portrait images, all featuring the person from the attached image. ensure that the middle photo is the same photo as the attached image, Ensure the person’s identity, facial structure, and style remain consistent across all nine posts. Each of the 9 images should present a unique concept, outfit, pose, and environment that fits a stylish, modern Instagram aesthetic. Include a mix of: – Lifestyle shots – Cinematic portraits – Fashion/streetwear scenes – Close-up beauty shots – Travel or outdoor vibes – Cozy indoor moments – Minimalist studio portraits Make every image hyperrealistic and shot as if with a professional camera: – Natural skin texture – Accurate lighting – Sharp details – Professional depth of field – High-quality color grading – Authentic expressions and posing Ensure all 9 images feel coherent as a feed: – Consistent character likeness – Similar visual tone and color palette – Aesthetic balance across the grid – Cinematic and modern photography style Final deliverable: a 3×3 Instagram grid layout of nine separate 3:4 ratio hyperrealistic portraits of the person from the attached photo.

#185 Editorial
AI Influencer
Use the person in the input image @luna-new as the ONLY subject. Preserve their identity and facial features clearly. Create a hyper-realistic high-fashion editorial photo inside a surreal 3D geometric “color box” room (a hollow cube / tilted cube set). Each render MUST randomly choose: 1) a bold single-color box vivid and saturated, 2) a dynamic “cool” fashion pose (gravity-defying or extreme stretch / leap / sideways bracing against the walls), 3) a dramatic camera angle tilted horizon. The subject appears full-body and sharp, wearing an avant-garde fashion styling that feels modern and editorial premium fabric texture. Keep clothing tasteful and fashion-forward. The subject’s pose should feel athletic, stylish, and unusual—like a magazine campaign shot. Lighting: studio quality, crisp and cinematic; strong key light with controlled soft shadows, subtle rim light; realistic reflections and bounce light from the colored walls. Ultra-detailed skin texture, natural pores, realistic fabric weave, clean edges, high dynamic range.  Composition: subject centered with plenty of negative space and strong geometric lines; the box perspective frames the subject.  Color: the box color is a SINGLE bold color and MUST be different each run (random vivid hue). The subject’s outfit contrasts well with the box color. Output: hyper-real, photorealistic, 8k detail, editorial campaign quality, sharp focus on subject, no motion blur, no distortion of face, natural proportions. -new

{   "prompt": "Create a hyper-realistic, cinematic Instagram post layout where the Instagram UI exists as a physical, tangible 3D object, photographed like a premium commercial product shot. The result should feel indistinguishable from a real studio photograph.\n\nInstagram Frame (UI Accuracy – Critical):\n- Authentic Instagram interface rendered as a solid white physical 3D card\n- Smooth matte plastic surface with subtle micro-texture\n- Slight thickness visible on edges, realistic bevels\n- Perfectly rounded corners (exact Instagram radius)\n- Soft studio reflections and realistic edge highlights\n\nTop Bar (Pixel-accurate UI):\n- Circular profile avatar on the left\n- Username text: \"Cherry\" in Instagram’s default bold UI font\n- Light blue FOLLOW button with correct proportions\n- Three-dot menu icon aligned to the far right\n- Exact spacing, typography, and icon sizing matching the real Instagram app\n- Aspect ratio 1:1, centered, balanced, premium composition\n\nMain Subject (Pose – Match Reference Image Exactly):\n- A photorealistic athletic woman partially emerging out of the Instagram frame into real 3D space\n- Seated pose:\n  - Both legs bent and angled to the side\n  - One knee slightly raised and closer to the chest\n  - Arms gently wrapped around the raised knee\n  - Hands relaxed, fingers naturally resting\n  - Torso leaning slightly back against the frame edge\n- Expression: calm, thoughtful, self-assured\n- Gaze: looking slightly to the side and upward, not engaging the camera\n- Natural body proportions, relaxed posture, editorial realism\n- No exaggerated curves, no artificial posing\n\nClothing (Nike Only – Realistic Fit):\n- Muted ivory/off-white Nike fitted short-sleeve blouse\n  - Visible white Nike swoosh\n  - Natural fabric stretch and tension\n- Deep blue Nike athletic pants, length up to the knee\n  - Tailored performance-fit silhouette\n  - Realistic fabric weight with subtle folds at the knee bend\n  - Clean stitching and breathable sports material\n- Clean white Nike sneakers\n  - Slight wear realism\n  - Correct sole texture and stitching\n- Premium sportswear look, real commercial styling\n- No distortion, no fantasy fashion\n\nBackground (Inside the Instagram Post Only):\n- Dark indoor gym or studio environment\n- Cool blue and muted purple cinematic lighting\n- Soft haze in the background\n- Subtle volumetric light beams barely visible\n- Shallow depth of field, background softly blurred\n- Subject and Instagram frame remain sharp and dominant\n\nLighting & Photorealism:\n- Studio-grade cinematic lighting\n- Soft key light illuminating the subject naturally\n- Gentle rim light outlining the body and Instagram frame\n- Realistic skin texture with visible pores and natural highlights\n- Accurate contact shadows where the subject touches the frame\n- Physically correct light falloff and reflections\n\nFooter UI (Engagement Section):\n- Instagram action icons: like, comment, share, save (accurate icons)\n- Text visible: \"785 likes\"\n- Caption begins with \"Cherry\"\n- Caption text:\n  \"Freedom isn’t found in comfort. It’s built in the quiet moments where discipline meets belief.\"\n- Hashtags partially visible and naturally cropped\n\nOverall Style & Quality:\n- Ultra-high resolution\n- Advertising-grade realism\n- Clean, modern, editorial Instagram aesthetic\n- Hyper-realistic blend of 3D object + real photography\n- No extra elements\n- No text errors\n- No distortion\n- Looks like a real product photoshoot, not AI art" }

The woman, the PS5, and the sofa are all sharp.", "settings": "Smartphone Simulation, 24mm Lens, 1/100s, ISO 400 (Natural Window Light)" }, "color_grading": { "white_balance": "Neutral Daylight (Cozy/Warm)", "shadows": "Soft shadows on floor and sofa", "highlights": "Soft highlights on blonde hair and skin" } }, "final_prompt_string": "A candid raw mirror selfie photograph shot on Smartphone f/11. She is twisting her body to show her profile and making a playful kissy face. She wears a tight black sleeveless tank top and tight light pink booty shorts. She holds a black iPhone. Background is sharp and detailed: A modern living room with a grey sofa, a white media cabinet with a white PlayStation 5 console and black headphones, and a faux fireplace are clearly visible with no bokeh. Create a full Instagram-style 3×3 grid feed composed of nine different portrait images, all featuring the person and the dog from the attached image. ensure that the middle photo is the same photo as the attached image, Ensure the person’s identity, facial structure, and style remain consistent across all nine posts. Each of the 9 images should present a unique concept, outfit, pose, and environment that fits a stylish, modern Instagram aesthetic. Include a mix of: – Lifestyle shots – Cinematic portraits – Fashion/streetwear scenes – Close-up beauty shots – Travel or outdoor vibes – Cozy indoor moments – Minimalist studio portraits Make every image hyperrealistic and shot as if with a professional camera: – Natural skin texture – Accurate lighting – Sharp details – Professional depth of field – High-quality color grading – Authentic expressions and posing Ensure all 9 images feel coherent as a feed: – Consistent character likeness – Similar visual tone and color palette – Aesthetic balance across the grid – Cinematic and modern photography style Final deliverable: a 3×3 Instagram grid layout of nine separate 3:4 ratio hyperrealistic portraits of the person from the attached photo.
#231 AI Influencer 💁‍♀️
selfie
A raw, screen-captured livestream still of a 24-year-old female influencer sitting on her unmade bed at night, frozen mid-reaction as something shocking happens off-camera. Her eyes are widened instinctively, mouth slightly open, expression unperformed. Heavy H.264 livestream compression, macro-blocking in shadow areas, banding in the dark walls. Ring light slightly off-axis causing uneven facial falloff, skin texture intact with visible pores, faint under-eye creasing. Phone camera glare reflects in her pupils. Pixel noise crawling in the shadows. Looks accidentally captured, not posed.

#252 Candid Paparazzi 📸
{   "meta_data": {     "style": "Raw Paparazzi/Press Photography - Telephoto Compression",     "aspect_ratio": "3:2 (standard full frame)"   },   "prompt_components": {     "subject_analysis": "A famous luxury fashion heiress mid-meltdown. She is red-faced, mouth open screaming, tears streaming down cheeks smudging mascara. She wears an expensive, rumpled designer cashmere tracksuit and has oversized sunglasses pushed atop messy blonde hair. One hand aggressively thrusts a passport into the air towards an unimpressed gate agent. A pile of logo-heavy Louis Vuitton luggage is next to her legs.",     "the_chaos_factor": "A deserted airport terminal gate late at night. Behind her, massive LED departure screens are aggressively glitching with corrupted text, static, and flashing colors. A stony-faced airline employee stands behind a podium saying 'CLOSED'. A few curious travelers watch from a distance.",     "lighting_tech": "Harsh direct on-camera strobe firing. The flash creates hot spots on her sweaty forehead and the plastic passport page, mixing uglily with the cold blue/green ambient terminal fluorescents and the flickering light from the glitching screens.",     "camera_gear": "Canon 1D X Mark III paired with a 70-200mm f/2.8L lens, zoomed to approx 135mm for compression from behind the barrier rope.",     "imperfections_and_artifacts": "High ISO color noise (ISO 12800). Motion blur on the gesturing hand holding the passport. Color banding and scan lines visible on the glitching background screens due to shutter speed sync issues. Gritty, unretouched aesthetic.",     "meta_tokens": "Candid street style, press photo realism, tabloid aesthetic, airport meltdown, viral moment, raw dng, grainy, unretouched, flash photography, public freakout."   },   "full_prompt_string": "Raw paparazzi photograph, telephoto lens compression, Canon 1D X Mark III, 70-200mm f/2.8. A luxury fashion heiress is screaming, tears welling, arguing with airport staff at a closed gate late at night. Passport raised aggressively mid-gesture. Rumpled designer tracksuit, messy hair, smudged mascara. Harsh direct on-camera flash mixed with ambient terminal light. Behind her, massive departure screens are glitching with corrupted static and text. High ISO grain, motion blur on hand, color banding from screens, gritty tabloid aesthetic, unretouched." }

#259 Candid Paparazzi 📸
{ "meta_data": { "style": "Raw Paparazzi/Press Photography", "aspect_ratio": "3:2 (standard full frame)" }, "prompt_components": { "subject_analysis": "Dishevelled pop star, recognizable but messy, tangled bleached hair, streaked mascara running down cheeks. Wearing a ripped silk party dress, clutching a grimy metal railing. One bare, dirty foot on wet asphalt, the other in a broken heel. A hand with chipped nail polish thrust directly toward the camera lens to shield face from intense light.", "the_chaos_factor": "Grimy back alley behind a dive bar at 3:00 AM. Wet pavement reflecting sickly neon beer signs and red taillights. Overflowing dumpsters, graffiti-covered brick walls. A dense scrum of other photographers' arms, lenses, and flash units pushing into the frame, jostling the subject. A burly security guard's arm trying to push the camera back.", "lighting_tech": "Brutal, direct on-camera strobe firing at full power. Flash burn on the subject's blocking hand and forehead. Mixed color temperatures: cool white flash clashes with warm, sickly tungsten streetlights and neon background signage.", "camera_gear": "Nikon D6 DSLR coupled with a Nikkor 24-70mm f/2.8 lens, shot wide at 24mm.", "imperfections_and_artifacts": "Extreme high ISO color noise (ISO 51200), significant motion blur from stumbling and camera shake. Focus is slightly missed on the blocking hand. Red-eye effect visible. Lens flare ghosts from direct flash hits on nearby surfaces.", "meta_tokens": "Candid street style, press photo realism, raw extraction, tabloid aesthetic, tmz style, gettyimages archive aesthetic, grainy, unretouched." }, "full_prompt_string": "Raw paparazzi photograph, Nikon D6 with 24-70mm f/2.8 lens at 24mm, brutal direct on-camera flash. A dishevelled pop star stumbles out of a grimey dive bar back door at 3:00 AM, hand thrust up blocking the blinding strobe light. Mascara running down face, tangled hair, torn silk dress. One bare dirty foot on wet asphalt, missing shoe. Flash burn highlights on skin. Chaotic alleyway environment, wet pavement reflecting neon, dumpsters, scrum of other photographers pushing in, security guard arms. Extreme high ISO grain, motion blur, missed focus, mixed lighting temperatures, tabloid aesthetic, press photo realism, unretouched raw extraction." } @eva

{   "subject": "Young female model with fair skin, sultry and captivating expression, head tilted slightly back, lips slightly parted.",   "clothing": "White textured lingerie or camisole top with thin, intricate spaghetti straps.",   "hair": "Platinum blonde to white hair, soft loose waves, mid-length, backlit by the studio lights highlighting individual strands.",   "face": "Flawless skin texture, contoured cheekbones, glossy nude-pink lips, defined nose, soft gaze, dramatic eye makeup visible through glasses.",   "accessories": "Oversized clear pink acetate eyeglasses that catch the light, small gold hoop earrings, layered gold chain necklaces, crystal-embellished headband visible on the side.",   "environment": "Studio setting with a smooth, solid background transitioning between deep blue and violet gradients.",   "lighting": "Cinematic split lighting (gel lighting); intense neon pink/magenta light source from the left, cool neon cyan/blue light source from the right, creating a dual-tone effect on the skin and hair, strong rim lighting.",   "camera": "Portrait orientation, medium close-up shot, eye-level angle.",   "lenses": "85mm portrait lens, aperture f/1.8 for shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the eyes and glasses frames, soft bokeh on the background hair.",   "meta_tokens_for_photorealism": "8k resolution, RAW photo, hyper-realistic, highly detailed texture, pore-level detail, ray tracing, sharp focus, masterpiece, professional photography.",   "style": "Synthwave, cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-noir, high-fashion editorial, retro-futuristic, vaporwave, glossy magazine style." }

#268 Cinematic

selfie
{ "meta_data":{"style":"iPhone Pro Max Photography","aspect_ratio":"9:16"}, "prompt_components":{ "subject":"Beautiful 24-year-old Instagram model, fair skin, natural glam makeup, long styled hair, taking a mirror-style selfie with her iPhone while leaning against a new McLaren. Smart HDR lighting, neon reflections, Deep Fusion detail, Apple ProRAW color, authentic handheld framing, natural skin texture, slight digital noise, mild clipping from bright signs, real car reflections.", "negative_prompt":"DSLR, cinema lens, anamorphic, film grain, heavy bokeh, studio lighting, perfect skin blur, unrealistic colors" }
#271 Candid Paparazzi 📸
{   "meta_data": {     "style": "Raw Paparazzi/Press Photography - Telephoto Compression",     "aspect_ratio": "3:2 (standard full frame)"   },   "prompt_components": {     "subject_analysis": "A famous luxury fashion heiress mid-meltdown. She is red-faced, mouth open screaming, tears streaming down cheeks smudging mascara. She wears an expensive, rumpled designer cashmere tracksuit and has oversized sunglasses pushed atop messy blonde hair. One hand aggressively thrusts a passport into the air towards an unimpressed gate agent. A pile of logo-heavy Louis Vuitton luggage is next to her legs.",     "the_chaos_factor": "A deserted airport terminal gate late at night. Behind her, massive LED departure screens are aggressively glitching with corrupted text, static, and flashing colors. A stony-faced airline employee stands behind a podium saying 'CLOSED'. A few curious travelers watch from a distance.",     "lighting_tech": "Harsh direct on-camera strobe firing. The flash creates hot spots on her sweaty forehead and the plastic passport page, mixing uglily with the cold blue/green ambient terminal fluorescents and the flickering light from the glitching screens.",     "camera_gear": "Canon 1D X Mark III paired with a 70-200mm f/2.8L lens, zoomed to approx 135mm for compression from behind the barrier rope.",     "imperfections_and_artifacts": "High ISO color noise (ISO 12800). Motion blur on the gesturing hand holding the passport. Color banding and scan lines visible on the glitching background screens due to shutter speed sync issues. Gritty, unretouched aesthetic.",     "meta_tokens": "Candid street style, press photo realism, tabloid aesthetic, airport meltdown, viral moment, raw dng, grainy, unretouched, flash photography, public freakout."   },   "full_prompt_string": "Raw paparazzi photograph, telephoto lens compression, Canon 1D X Mark III, 70-200mm f/2.8. A luxury fashion heiress is screaming, tears welling, arguing with airport staff at a closed gate late at night. Passport raised aggressively mid-gesture. Rumpled designer tracksuit, messy hair, smudged mascara. Harsh direct on-camera flash mixed with ambient terminal light. Behind her, massive departure screens are glitching with corrupted static and text. High ISO grain, motion blur on hand, color banding from screens, gritty tabloid aesthetic, unretouched." }

Wearing a ripped silk party dress, clutching a grimy metal railing. One bare, dirty foot on wet asphalt, the other in a broken heel. A hand with chipped nail polish thrust directly toward the camera lens to shield face from intense light.",     "the_chaos_factor": "Grimy back alley behind a dive bar at 3:00 AM. Wet pavement reflecting sickly neon beer signs and red taillights. Overflowing dumpsters, graffiti-covered brick walls. A dense scrum of other photographers' arms, lenses, and flash units pushing into the frame, jostling the subject. A burly security guard's arm trying to push the camera back.",     "lighting_tech": "Brutal, direct on-camera strobe firing at full power. Flash burn on the subject's blocking hand and forehead. Mixed color temperatures: cool white flash clashes with warm, sickly tungsten streetlights and neon background signage.",     "camera_gear": "Nikon D6 DSLR coupled with a Nikkor 24-70mm f/2.8 lens, shot wide at 24mm.",     "imperfections_and_artifacts": "Extreme high ISO color noise (ISO 51200), significant motion blur from stumbling and camera shake. Focus is slightly missed on the blocking hand. Red-eye effect visible. Lens flare ghosts from direct flash hits on nearby surfaces.",     "meta_tokens": "Candid street style, press photo realism, raw extraction, tabloid aesthetic, tmz style, gettyimages archive aesthetic, grainy, unretouched."   },   "full_prompt_string": "Raw paparazzi photograph, Nikon D6 with 24-70mm f/2.8 lens at 24mm, brutal direct on-camera flash. A dishevelled pop star stumbles out of a grimey dive bar back door at 3:00 AM, hand thrust up blocking the blinding strobe light. Mascara running down face, tangled hair, torn silk dress. One bare dirty foot on wet asphalt, missing shoe. Flash burn highlights on skin. Chaotic alleyway environment, wet pavement reflecting neon, dumpsters, scrum of other photographers pushing in, security guard arms. Extreme high ISO grain, motion blur, missed focus, mixed lighting temperatures, tabloid aesthetic, press photo realism, unretouched raw extraction." }

A pop of direct, on-camera flash adds harsh specular highlights to the grease and gold.", "optical_characteristics": "Razor sharp focus on the bite point, deep depth of field showing the car interior details, zero distortion.", "angle": "Eye-level from the passenger seat, capturing the cramped intensity." }, "background": { "setting": "Driver's seat of a Bentley Continental GT at night.", "elements": [ "Sharply defined leather grain on the steering wheel", "Out-of-focus drive-thru menu board showing burger prices", "Reflective piano black dashboard surfaces showing smears" ], "atmosphere": "Stuffy car interior, scent of fried food, tense air.", "vibe": { "energy": "Manic, high-contrast desperation.", "contrast": "The priceless antique crown versus a $5 fast food burger.", "caption_energy": "Heavy lies the crown, hungry lies the stomach." } } }, "variation_b_twist": { "subject": { "description": "A cinematic, composed portrait of a woman in ornate queen regalia, staring deadpan ahead while mechanically eating a burger in a luxury SUV.", "mirror_rules": "Medium format portrait, subject's eyeline is straight ahead through the windshield, ignoring the camera.", "age": "30s", "expression": { "eyes": "Glassy, thousand-yard stare, unwavering, reflecting the neon signs outside.", "mouth": "Mechanically chewing, devoid of emotion or enjoyment.", "overall": "Existential dread, stoic absurdity." }, "hair": { "style": "Elaborate braided updo supporting a massive diamond and sapphire crown.", "texture": "Every strand perfectly placed but showing tension from the weight of the crown." }, "body": { "skin": "Flawless, high-resolution foundation texture showing individual pores. Slight indentation mark on the forehead from the crown's weight.", "pose": "Perfectly upright posture in the driver's seat, one hand holding the burger to mouth with regal poise, the other on the steering wheel." }, "clothing": { "regalia": { "type": "Deep sapphire blue silk velvet gown with elaborate silver and pearl beadwork.", "fit": "Tailored, structured bodice.", "material": "Silk velvet catching the light with a rich sheen. Individual pearls and silver wire visible in macro detail.", "imperfection": "None visible on the clothes; the imperfection is the burger wrapper in her pristine hand." } } }, "accessories": { "device": { "type": "Phase One IQ4", "details": "150MP Digital Back, Schneider Kreuznach lens, tripod mounted." } }, "photography": { "camera_style": "Medium Format Digital Cinematic Portrait", "quality": "8k resolution, ISO 100 (Zero Noise), massive dynamic range preserving details in deep velvet shadows and bright neon highlights.", "lighting": "Cinematic mixed lighting. Primary light is the drive-thru menu board (green/yellow cast) reflecting off her face and crown jewels. Interior car ambient light (soft purple LED) fills shadows.", "optical_characteristics": "Extremely shallow depth of field (creamy bokeh), focus razor sharp on her eyes and the crown jewels. The background is a beautiful wash of colored light.", "angle": "Slightly low angle from outside the car window, looking in." }, "background": { "setting": "Driver's seat of a Mercedes-Maybach GLS at a drive-thru window.", "elements": [ "The reflection of the crown superimposed over the drive-thru menu board in the window glass", "Pristine beige leather interior", "Rain streaks on the window glass exterior" ], "atmosphere": "Quiet, hermetically sealed luxury, melancholic.", "vibe": { "energy": "Absurdist, melancholic composure.", "contrast": "The stoic royal poise versus the mundane act of fast food consumption.", "caption_energy": "The realm is starving." } } } @cherryglow

#303 Candid Paparazzi 📸
{ "meta_data": { "style": "Modern High-Res Paparazzi/Press Photography", "aspect_ratio": "3:2" }, "prompt_components": { "subject_analysis": "Candid capture of an A-list actress e.g. completely off-guard at 5 AM. She has messy, unkempt hair tied loosely, wearing oversized patterned pajama pants, a mismatched hoodie, and slide sandals. She is squinting intensely, flinching away from a sudden flash, holding a cardboard take-out coffee carrier in one hand and a bright blue tied-off plastic dog poop bag in the other. Her expression is one of annoyance and exhaustion.", "the_chaos_factor": "Pre-dawn darkness on a wet city sidewalk. A small, scruffy rescue dog on a taut leash pulls her forward. The frame edges show the lenses and arms of competing photographers shoving in. A large security guard's hand partially enters the frame, attempting to block the lens. Wet pavement reflects the harsh light.", "lighting_tech": "Harsh, direct on-camera strobe flash creating blinding white highlights on her skin and clothing, and hard, deep shadows immediately behind her. The background features mixed color temperatures from warm tungsten streetlights and neon bodega signs reacting to the cool flash.", "camera_gear": "Canon EOS R3 + RF 24-70mm f/2.8 L IS USM lens.", "image_quality_tech": "ISO 200, 8k resolution, ultra-detailed textures on fabric and hair, incredibly sharp focus on her squinting eyes, clean digital capture, zero noise, hyper-realistic.", "meta_tokens": "candid street style, modern press photo, exclusive editorial capture, raw moment, TMZ style, stolen shot, Associated Press wire." }, "full_prompt_string": "A harsh, direct flash paparazzi photograph capturing an A-list actress off-guard at 5 AM on a wet city sidewalk. She is squinting and flinching, wearing oversized pajama pants, a mismatched hoodie, and slides, with messy hair. She holds a coffee carrier and a blue poop bag, pulled by a scruffy dog on a leash. A security guard's hand tries to block the frame. The lighting is a blinding on-camera strobe mixed with warm background streetlights. Canon EOS R3 capture, RF 24-70mm f/2.8 L IS USM lens, ISO 200, 8k resolution, razor sharp focus, ultra-detailed textures, zero noise, highly realistic, candid street style, modern press photo, raw moment, exclusive capture.", "negative_prompt": "film grain, noise, pixelation, blurry, low quality, distortion, artifacts, high ISO, vintage grain, soft focus, studio lighting, softbox, beauty dish, posed, cinematic golden hour, glamour shot, perfectly styled hair, smiling at camera" }
